label: AdaMatic
caption: Recurring payments on Cardano, on autopilot.
summary: Automate HOSKY rewards and recurring ADA payments on Cardano. Set the cadence, deposit, and AdaMatic’s smart contracts pull on schedule. Non-custodial, cancel anytime.
description: AdaMatic is a non-custodial automation layer for Cardano. Set up recurring payments backed by an audited Aiken validator: today it powers HOSKY auto-pulls for delegators of every Hosky-affiliated rugpool; recurring ADA payments and fiat-pegged schedules are next. You stay in control of the funds at every step — nothing leaves your wallet until the contract’s next scheduled pull, and you can cancel any time. The cheapest auto-pull on Cardano: operator fee shown up front, typical pull well under ₳ 1.
